error.signature: RuntimeError: GPU device not found. Could not list physical devices: GPU
error.regex: (GPU.*not found|Could not.*physical devices.*GPU|No GPU.*detected|CUDA_ERROR_NO_DEVICE|cannot find.*GPU|device.*GPU:0.*not found)

verdict.summary: TensorFlow does not detect any GPU. NVIDIA driver not installed, CUDA not configured, or tensorflow-cpu installed by mistake.

dead_ends.action: Install CUDA toolkit without the NVIDIA driver
dead_ends.why_fails: CUDA needs a compatible NVIDIA kernel driver. The toolkit alone is not enough.
tensorflow-gpu was merged into tensorflow in TF 2.1+. The separate package is abandoned.

workarounds.action: Install the NVIDIA driver and verify with nvidia-smi
workarounds.how: sudo apt install nvidia-driver-535 && nvidia-smi  # must show your GPU

workarounds.action: Install tensorflow with CUDA support, not tensorflow-cpu
workarounds.how: pip install tensorflow[and-cuda]  # NOT pip install tensorflow-cpu
print(tf.config.list_physical_devices('GPU'))  # should show your GPU; if empty, check driver/CUDA
